title: Circle 'Exploring' Arc Network Token Launch, Proof-of-Stake Shift: CEO
snippet: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire reiterated plans for its stablecoin-focused layer-1 blockchain to launch in mainnet “soon.”

title: Kraken Lands $200 Million Investment From Deutsche Börse
snippet: German stock exchange operator Deutsche Börse has invested $200 million in cryptocurrency exchange Kraken. title: Deutsche Börse invests in Kraken
snippet: Deutsche Börse has spent $200 million to buy a 1.5% fully diluted stake in crypto platform Kraken, deepening an existing strategic partnership between the two firms.
